arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea sent clear message over 'excessive' Viktor Gyokeres transfer clause
arts.sum: Red-hot Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres is being tracked by some of Europe's biggest clubs but the Portuguese outfit are refusing to budge and will demand his £85million release clause is met in order to strike a deal

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Arsenal join Brighton in £5m winger transfer battle after scouting mission
arts.sum: Premier League and top clubs from across Europe are keeping tabs on Hammarby's talented teenage attacking gem Bazoumana Toure, who is tearing up the Sweden's Allsvenskan

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds to Pep Guardiola 'war' threats
arts.sum: "I can repeat it very clear, I love Pep, I have admired him since I was 10 years old," Arteta assured after Arsenal's 4-2 win over Leicester. Mikel Arteta has admitted that he carries a lot of respect for Pep Guardiola after the Manchester City boss promised war with the Gunners coach following recent comments.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners in mix for 23-year-old as talks 'intensify'
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly throw their hat into the ring to sign Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon, but the Magpies are confident of tying him down to fresh terms.

Gabriel Martinelli grabbed his first Gunners goal for six months when he netted after 19 minutes, and just before the half-time whistle he set up Trossard to double our lead as the winger atoned for his red card last weekend at Manchester City. We began trying to restore our healthier lead and only a superb reaction save from Hermansen prevented Gabriel scoring a header from a corner, with the keeper also blocking Riccardo Calafiori’s follow-up before Timber blasted over, and then after Saka tricked his way into the area, Trossard saw a stabbed effort strike the post.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face contract dilemma with two Mikel Arteta stars in line to depart on free transfers
arts.sum: Thomas Partey has been back to his best in the centre of midfield for Arsenal this season but the Gunners are yet to show any clear appetite to extend his contract, meaning the Ghana international is currently in line to leave the Emirates Stadium on a free transfer in 2025

arts.ttl: Leicester boss Steve Cooper slams two controversies that benefitted 'lucky' Arsenal
arts.sum: Leicester suffered a gut-wrenching defeat to Arsenal on Saturday, with Foxes boss Steve Cooper left furious with referee Sam Barrott over two of the Gunners' goals

arts.ttl: Arsenal press conference: Mikel Arteta on Leicester drama, Nwaneri and Guardiola comments
arts.sum: With seconds remaining it appeared that Arsenal had somehow conspired to drop two points, but Trossard popped up again at the back post to poke in Saka's corner off Ndidi. It seemed as though the game would be a walk in the park Arsenal from that point but within a minute of the restart Leicester had one back as Wilfred Ndidi headed home from a free kick.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Bukayo Saka denied Premier League assist record despite Mikel Arteta plea
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is denied a slice of Premier League history in Arsenal's 4-2 win over Leicester City, as the Gunners' third effort against the Foxes goes down as an own goal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta fires blunt Arsenal Premier League title message after Man City blow
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has issued a blunt title response after Arsenal took advantage of Manchester City’s slip-up with a dramatic late Premier League win over Leicester City. The victory sees Arsenal now level on points with City thanks to a last-gasp 4-2 victory at the Emirates Stadium.
